originalTitle: Is there an AI stock market bubble, and is it ready to burst?
summary: Despite the Iran war, inflation and debt fears, US markets keep hitting record highs, fueled largely by AI. BBC's Samira Hussain looks into whether that bubble will burst.
content:
Despite the Iran war, rising inflation and worries about rising government debt, US stock markets continue to hit all-time highs this year. That's largely driven by the huge boom in investment in Artificial Intelligence.

The apparent mismatch between sky high stock market valuations and the real economy is beginning to set off some alarm bells ringing among investors. BBC's Samira Hussain reports from Wall Street.

Watch: Massive hailstones pound Denver in powerful storm

Strong winds, intense rain and hailstones the size of golf balls pelted the city and the surrounding area on Monday.

Why Fifa is being investigated over World Cup ticket prices

New York and New Jersey are looking into the association after fans have reportedly been "misled" over ticket sales and seat locations.

Watch: UFC arena construction begins at White House ahead of fight

The massive structure will host a cage fight as part of celebrations marking the 250th anniversary of the US Declaration of Independence.

Watch: Nasa shows renderings for planned permanent moon base

The plans include permanent human habitation on the Earth's only natural satellite by 2032.

Protests escalate outside ICE facility over alleged inhumane conditions

The Department of Homeland security said in a statement that the detainees receive "medical, dental, and mental health services as available".

Watch: Texas police rescue baby from car stuck in floodwater

Texas police say a father tried to cross a flooded road after heavy rains inundated the area, urging motorists not to do the same. Neither the driver nor the baby was hurt.

'Football is life': Ted Lasso actor signs with US pro football team

Cristo Fernández, well known for playing a footballer in the popular TV series Ted Lasso, tells the BBC it is a "dream come true" to sign with a US pro football team.

Watch: Trump to have annual medical exam ahead of 80th birthday

The BBC’s Bernd Debusmann explains the routine medical check of the president of the US.

US marks Memorial Day with wreaths, bagpipes and salutes

In ceremonies across the nation, the Americans who died while serving in the US military are remembered.

Orange County residents react to evacuation after chemical tank explosion threat

Orange County residents had to evacuate following the threat of a failing chemical tank exploding.

What are the Enhanced Games - or the 'Olympics on steroids'?

The inaugural Enhanced Games will feature dozens of elite athletes using performance-enhancing drugs.

Moment SpaceX rocket explodes in the Indian Ocean after splashdown

Elon Musk's SpaceX has successfully launched its Starship V3 rocket, which landed in a planned fiery explosion on Friday.

Watch: Miley Cyrus receives her star in the Hollywood Walk of Fame

Fighter jet shoots down UFO in newly declassified video

Experts say the videos released by the US government give no evidence of alien technology or extraterrestrial life.

Residents wade through flood waters and submerged cars in New York City

Mayor Zohran Mamdani said the intense rainfall, which flooded some homes, had overwhelmed the city's sewer system.

Fans react to Stephen Colbert’s final show

The late-night host will appear behind his CBS desk for the final time after the network announced last summer that the show would end after 11 seasons.

Moment Cybertruck driver intentionally drives into Texas lake

Rescuers removed the vehicle from near the shoreline and police arrested the driver, who was attempting to use the vehicle's "wade mode".

New video captures engine ripping off cargo plane in deadly Kentucky crash

As part of the ongoing investigation into the crash that killed 14 people, officials released footage showing the engine detaching during takeoff.

Police officer catches baby dropped from window of burning home

Body cam footage shows the moment a baby was thrown from a window and caught by an officer during a house fire.

Trump: White House ballroom to be 'drone-proof' with military complex

The president, who claims the building is a ‘gift’ to the US, says it will include a hospital and research facilities.
chineseTitle: AI 股市是否存在泡沫，是否已准备好破裂？
chineseSummary: 尽管存在伊朗战争、通货膨胀和债务担忧，美国市场在人工智能的推动下仍不断创下历史新高。 BBC 的萨米拉·侯赛因 (Samira Hussain) 调查了泡沫是否会破裂。
chineseContent:
尽管存在伊朗战争、通胀上升以及对政府债务上升的担忧，美国股市今年仍继续创下历史新高。这很大程度上是由人工智能投资的巨大繁荣推动的。

天价股市估值与实体经济之间明显的不匹配开始在投资者中敲响警钟。英国广播公司 (BBC) 的萨米拉·侯赛因 (Samira Hussain) 来自华尔街的报道。

观看：巨大的冰雹在强大的风暴中袭击丹佛

周一，强风、暴雨和高尔夫球大小的冰雹袭击了这座城市及周边地区。

国际足联为何因世界杯门票价格受到调查

据报道，球迷在门票销售和座位位置上被“误导”，纽约和新泽西州正在调查该协会。

观看：UFC 竞技场在比赛前在白宫开始施工

作为纪念美国《独立宣言》250 周年庆祝活动的一部分，这座巨大的建筑将举办一场笼斗比赛。

观看：美国宇航局展示了计划中的永久月球基地的效果图

该计划包括到 2032 年在地球唯一的天然卫星上实现人类永久居住。

ICE 设施外抗议活动因涉嫌不人道条件而升级

美国国土安全部在一份声明中表示，被拘留者可以获得“现有的医疗、牙科和心理健康服务”。

观看：德克萨斯州警察从陷入洪水的汽车中救出婴儿

得克萨斯州警方表示，大雨淹没该地区后，一名父亲试图穿过被洪水淹没的道路，并敦促驾车者不要这样做。司机和婴儿都没有受伤。

“足球就是生命”：泰德·拉索演员与美国职业橄榄球队签约

克里斯托·费尔南德斯 (Cristo Fernández) 因在热门电视剧《特德·拉索》(Ted Lasso) 中扮演足球运动员而闻名，他告诉 BBC，与美国职业橄榄球队签约是“梦想成真”。

观看：特朗普将在 80 岁生日前进行年度体检

BBC 的贝恩德·德布斯曼 (Bernd Debusmann) 解释了美国总统的例行体检。

美国以花圈、风笛和敬礼纪念阵亡将士纪念日

在全国各地的仪式上，人们缅怀在美军服役期间牺牲的美国人。

奥兰治县居民在化学罐爆炸威胁后对疏散作出反应

由于化学罐发生爆炸，奥兰治县居民不得不撤离。

什么是增强型运动会——或者“类固醇奥运会”？

SpaceX 火箭溅落后在印度洋爆炸的瞬间

观看：麦莉·赛勒斯在好莱坞星光大道上获得星星

纽约市居民涉水穿过洪水和被淹没的汽车

市长佐赫兰·马姆达尼 (Zohran Mamdani) 表示，强降雨淹没了一些房屋，导致该市的下水道系统不堪重负。

粉丝们对斯蒂芬·科尔伯特的最后一场演出的反应

新视频捕捉到肯塔基州致命坠机事故中发动机从货机上脱落

作为对导致 14 人死亡的坠机事件正在进行的调查的一部分，官员们公布了显示发动机在起飞过程中分离的镜头。

随身摄像机的镜头显示了一名婴儿在房屋火灾中被从窗户扔出并被一名警察抓住的那一刻。

特朗普：白宫宴会厅将与军事设施“防无人机”

总统声称这座建筑是送给美国的“礼物”，并表示它将包括一家医院和研究设施。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于全球新闻信号，适合用于观察外部环境、政策变化、地缘风险和市场情绪。
